not_the_objective: Do not repeat local reference-project learning when existing records already prove the relevant directory has been learned.
Do not implement product-code fixes without a fresh dirty-worktree audit and rollback checkpoint for the active slice.
Do not ask for more reference repositories before using the completed local learning records.
Do not ask for repositories already covered by C:\Users\xiao\Downloads\第一次补充参考.
Do not describe targeted engineering learning as literal whole-repository line-by-line audit.
Do not rename internal package paths that still legitimately use literature_assistant.
Do not treat the new code plan as implementation evidence.
Do not interrupt the active code-plan objective to study C:\Users\xiao\Downloads\文献检索\scansci-pdf-master; study it after the current goal is complete.
Do not claim full-suite, desktop, real-provider, release, or public-source completion from fake-provider or local focused tests.
Do not unignore the whole tests tree or workspace_artifacts; promote only reviewed, path-explicit verification evidence.
Do not stage candidate files from a deleted or detached delegated worktree; only the current source root can be used after a fresh final scrub.
Do not claim full natural-prompt writing-chain success when the live smoke exits with tool_capability_probe_failed or no_tool_calls.
Do not treat pywebview reruns as a release green light unless the pythonnet close-path mitigation and stress evidence are recorded with residual risk.

rollback.restore_policy: Run restore only after explicit user rollback intent.

mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Long-running agents need persisted checkpoints and thread-scoped state for interruption recovery.
Context is finite; resumed work must preserve only authoritative state and avoid relying on stale transcript memory.

mature_references_checked.source: NASA Software Engineering Handbook requirements guidance
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Traceability matrices link requirements to verification evidence and expose missing coverage.
Risky work should progress through small verified changes with rollback evidence.

mature_references_checked.source: Vercel AI SDK tool calling and loop control documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Multi-step tool loops need explicit stop conditions and should continue only until no further tool calls or a stop condition is met.

mature_references_checked.source: MCP tool/result specification and Python SDK client guidance
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Tool calls return structured CallToolResult-style content; internal envelopes should stay separate from provider transcript projection.
Tool and generation loops should expose machine-readable stop reasons rather than relying on assistant prose.
Tool calls and tool responses are structured protocol messages; malformed provider payloads should be treated as adapter/protocol failures.

mature_references_checked.source: Vercel AI SDK provider/tool calling documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Tool dispatch is a provider capability path with explicit tools/toolChoice behavior, not equivalent to ordinary chat success.

mature_references_checked.source: Python pathlib / os.path canonical path behavior
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Resolve filesystem paths before containment decisions, especially when symlinks or equivalent indirections may be present.
Canonicalize and allowlist paths before local file access; do not rely on raw user path strings.

mature_references_checked.source: Microsoft Windows reparse point and junction documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Windows reparse points and junctions can redirect path access and must be treated through resolved real targets.

mature_references_checked.source: NIST TREC relevance judgments / qrels format guidance
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Retrieval quality evaluation depends on separate judged qrels rows, not on the retrieval method label.
trec_eval evaluates system runs against judged results files, so canonical qrels should gate quality claims.
BEIR keeps corpus, queries, and qrels as distinct dataset inputs with relevance scores.

mature_references_checked.source: Vercel AI SDK tool calling and loop control documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Natural-prompt acceptance should observe provider-selected tool calls, tool-result backflow, and a final answer after the loop stop condition.
Applications execute model-requested tools and return tool results for the model to use in the final response.
Tool-result content is structured protocol output and should be verified separately from audit preview and final assistant prose.
Writing/export state should keep document content, citation data, and style profile separate from the rendered DOCX/Markdown output.
Scholarly outputs should preserve inspectable article structure, metadata, body, back matter, and references rather than only storing final prose.
Claim/evidence support banks can be modeled as target/body/motivation-like records rather than unstructured generated text.

mature_references_checked.source: FastAPI response model and OpenAPI documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Runtime API state should cross HTTP boundaries through explicit Pydantic request/response models so OpenAPI and typed clients remain synchronized.
Public state contracts should be model-backed and schema-generatable instead of untyped metadata bags.

mature_references_checked.source: Vercel AI SDK UI message parts / streaming data documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Agent Workspace should render typed runtime/workflow state projections rather than infer status from prose logs.
When a UI intentionally projects the same content in multiple places, tests should use findAllByText or scoped queries instead of singular findByText.
Ignored trees should be made auditable with path-explicit negation rules instead of broadly unignoring local runtime and private plan roots.

mature_references_checked.source: pytest usage and test discovery documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Focused pytest files can be rerun directly, and the cacheprovider plugin can be disabled with `-p no:cacheprovider` to avoid cache writes.
Frontend component tests should remain ordinary `*.test.tsx` files discoverable by Vitest rather than custom one-off harnesses.
Portable knowledge outputs should have an entry document plus associated resources in an inspectable bundle shape.
Export artifact groups should carry machine-readable metadata about resources and provenance.
A tool result envelope separates content, structuredContent, isError, and metadata; provider rendering should be a lossy projection, not the source of truth.
Claude tool_result blocks return execution output back to the model and should preserve the tool-use boundary distinctly from UI/audit summaries.

mature_references_checked.source: LangChain MCP adapters structured artifact pattern
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: MCP structuredContent can be preserved as an application artifact while provider content remains the model-visible projection.

mature_references_checked.source: Python PEP 8 public and internal interfaces guidance
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Callers outside a class/module boundary should use documented public interfaces instead of private underscore attributes.
Tests that exercise env/runtime-state behavior should isolate env vars, attributes, and filesystem paths instead of depending on the user runtime state.
Focused frontend tests and the full frontend suite should be run through Vitest rather than one-off browser checks when closing component/unit gates.
Frontend interaction tests should verify accessible controls by role/name, matching user-visible behavior.
Credential-bearing endpoint probes must validate DNS/IP destinations before network calls.
Desktop acceptance should exercise pywebview's native GUI loop and close behavior rather than browser-only checks.
Native desktop smoke can prove a top-level window by enumerating windows and checking title and visibility.
Staging-readiness should stage explicit pathspecs only after source-boundary review.

mature_references_checked.source: GitHub releases and source archive documentation
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Release source archives are generated from the tagged Git tree, so source-boundary decisions must be made before staging and tagging.

mature_references_checked.source: OWASP Secrets Management Cheat Sheet and GitHub secret scanning guidance
mature_references_checked.borrowed_rule: Secret scanning is a backstop; source-boundary reviews should keep credentials and runtime stores out of Git before publication.
Provider smoke should verify tool calls as structured protocol behavior, not only ordinary chat text.
API keys are bearer credentials and must remain masked in probes, records, and handoffs.
Use non-watch vitest run behavior for deterministic CI-style frontend test verification.
Use vite build as the production frontend build gate; generated dist output remains build output, not source staging material.

`create_window` windows are shown by `webview.start()`, and `webview.start(func=..., args=...)` is the documented GUI-loop startup hook used to move reload hotkey installation off async window events.
Top-level imports traverse `sys.path`; direct script execution with `tests/` first can shadow product packages, so product code should use package-qualified imports at this boundary.
Detached and prunable/missing linked worktrees are explicit states; a deleted worktree cannot be used as a staging equality anchor.
